originalRequest: Исправь это в самом ПФО, чтобы текущий runtime enforcement был достаточно жестко заставлял следовать этой методологии.

criteria.requirement: PFO must create a source-traced acceptance contract before implementation for non-trivial work.
criteria.sourceQuote: runtime enforcement был достаточно жестко заставлял следовать этой методологии
criteria.verification: pfo manifest creates .pfo/ACCEPTANCE_CONTRACT.json when missing; pfo acceptance init creates explicit criteria.
criteria.evidence: scripts/pfo.py defines default_acceptance_contract, cmd_acceptance init, and cmd_manifest writes .pfo/ACCEPTANCE_CONTRACT.json.
criteria.independentEvidence: docs/templates/pfo/ACCEPTANCE_CONTRACT.json and docs/gates/acceptance-contract-gate.md define the runtime contract shape.

criteria.requirement: PFO must block final verification if acceptance criteria are missing, pending, failed, or weakly proved.
criteria.sourceQuote: достаточно жестко заставлял следовать этой методологии
criteria.verification: pfo verify-work --pass-gate invokes validate_acceptance_contract.py before passing targeted verification.
criteria.evidence: scripts/pfo.py cmd_verify_work calls acceptance_contract_ready(project) and raises before pass-gate on failure.
criteria.independentEvidence: docs/gates/acceptance-contract-gate.md documents fail-closed status and evidence rules.

criteria.requirement: Self-authored validators cannot be the only proof for a criterion.
criteria.verification: Acceptance validator detects changed validate*.py evidence and requires independentEvidence.
criteria.evidence: scripts/validate_acceptance_contract.py checks changed validator references and fails without independentEvidence.
criteria.independentEvidence: This contract records independentEvidence for criteria that reference changed validation code.

criteria.requirement: The new enforcement must be wired into PFO production readiness, structure, runtime, and control harness validation.
criteria.verification: Production readiness and structure/runtime/control validators include acceptance enforcement artifacts.
criteria.evidence: scripts/production_readiness.py runs validate_acceptance_contract.py --self-check; validate_structure.py and validate_runtime.py require the new artifacts.
criteria.independentEvidence: scripts/validate_control_harness.py and docs/CONTROL_HARNESS.md include acceptance-contract as a computational feedback control.

criteria.requirement: PFO methodology must explicitly match Harness Engineering after the fix.
criteria.verification: Methodology and control harness docs describe acceptance contract as a guide/sensor runtime gate.
criteria.evidence: docs/METHODOLOGY.md requires acceptance contract creation before implementation and pass-gate closure after implementation.
criteria.independentEvidence: docs/CONTROL_HARNESS.md maps acceptance-contract into the computational feedback quadrant.

criteria.requirement: The change must be documented in dated changelog format used by the repository.
criteria.verification: CHANGELOG.md contains a dated release entry for the acceptance enforcement fix.
criteria.independentEvidence: validate_structure.py requires CHANGELOG.md as an existing repository artifact.
